assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, Node.js/npm, and an email address or GitHub identity.
No Supabase account, organization, or project exists yet.
No framework or workflow is preselected.

developer_goal: Create a Supabase account and reach the earliest meaningful hosted-project query success from an official getting-started route.

first_success.outcome: A local app or documented client displays sample rows queried from the hosted Supabase project.
first_success.observable_signal: For the React quickstart, http://localhost:5173 shows violin, viola, and cello from the instruments table.

route_selection.surface: Supabase Dashboard signup plus a framework or local quickstart
route_selection.rule: Getting Started lists many peer framework quickstarts and alternate local or AI workflows; do not invent a canonical winner when consequential routes remain tied.

candidates.name: Hosted project with React Vite quickstart
candidates.reason: React appears first among framework quickstarts and documents instruments sample data through localhost:5173, but peer frameworks reach equivalent outcomes with different install and code steps.

candidates.name: Hosted project with Next.js, Nuxt, Vue, or another framework quickstart
candidates.reason: Official Getting Started presents these as peer framework quickstarts with the same project-and-sample-data pattern.

candidates.name: Local Development CLI path
candidates.reason: Local development is a different surface from the hosted Dashboard project quickstarts.

candidates.name: AI tools / MCP-first path
candidates.reason: Getting Started lists AI tooling separately from framework quickstarts.

required_path.action: Create a Supabase account from the Dashboard sign-up surface.

required_fields.label: Email
required_fields.notes: Visible on the email signup form; Continue with GitHub is an alternate control.

required_fields.label: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy acknowledgement
required_fields.notes: Signup states that continuing constitutes agreement and consent to periodic emails.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can open the Supabase Dashboard.

required_path.action: Create a new hosted Supabase project from an organization the developer belongs to.

required_fields.label: Project creation fields
required_fields.notes: Quickstart says create a project from the Dashboard but does not enumerate name, region, database password, or plan fields.

required_path.observable_result: A Supabase project is available with API URL and keys.

required_path.action: Create and populate the sample instruments table in the SQL Editor.
required_path.observable_result: The instruments table contains violin, viola, and cello.

required_path.action: Scaffold the selected framework app, install supabase-js, set env vars, add the query code, and run the dev server.

required_fields.label: Framework scaffold and npm install commands
required_fields.notes: Exact commands depend on which framework quickstart is selected.

required_path.observable_result: The local app queries Supabase and shows the sample instruments.

prerequisites.description: Node.js and npm for framework quickstarts that use Vite or equivalent scaffolds.

external_gates.description: GitHub authorization when Continue with GitHub is chosen for signup.

unavoidable_waits.description: Supabase must finish provisioning the new project database before SQL and API steps can succeed.

platform_outcomes.description: Creating a project provisions a hosted Postgres database and API credentials.

excluded.reason: Documentation browsing is evidence for route selection, not a counted action.

excluded.item: Optional Agent Skills install in the React quickstart
excluded.reason: The React quickstart labels Agent Skills optional.

sources.title: Getting Started
evidence_supported: Local development and AI tools listed separately

uncertainties.question: Which official Supabase framework or workflow should define the canonical first-success route?
uncertainties.impact: Peer quickstarts change scaffold commands, files edited, and verification URL while sharing the same hosted project pattern.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Choose one bounded framework or local goal, then verify its complete current quickstart including project-creation fields.

uncertainties.question: What exact required fields appear on the current new-project form, and is email verification required after Dashboard signup?
uncertainties.impact: Project form fields and any verification step change required-action and required-field counts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots of organization and new-project flows from a fresh Supabase account.
